allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('postman_collection.json'\)\); [print\(i['name']\) for i in d['item']]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; towns=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(towns\)} towns: {[t[\\"id\\"] for t in towns]}'\)")
Bash(python -c "import json; towns=json.load\(open\('towns.json'\)\); [print\(t['id'], '->', t['neighbors']\) for t in towns]")
